city.zh: 维多利亚州 墨尔本

majorTuition.en: University of Melbourne international tuition varies: A$42,000-A$55,000/yr (~$27,096-$35,483).

desc.zh: 墨尔本大学是澳洲排名第一的大学，采用独特的Melbourne Model（先读通识再选专业）。Group of Eight成员。
desc.en: UMelb is Australia's #1 university with the unique Melbourne Model (broad first, then specialize). Member of the Group of Eight.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：31
• Commerce 商学：36
• Science 理学：35
• Biomedicine 生物医学：38
• Design 设计：33
• Engineering 工程（预科）：38
• Music 音乐：31
• Agriculture 农业：31

deadline.zh: 主要入学季：2月（第一学期）/ 7月（第二学期）\n申请截止：入学前2-6个月
deadline.en: Main intakes: Feb (Sem 1) / Jul (Sem 2)\nDeadlines: 2-6 months before intake

safetyDetail.zh: 墨尔本大学所在城市治安良好，澳大利亚整体安全指数高。校园设有24小时安保。
safetyDetail.en: University of Melbourne is in a safe city. Australia has high overall safety. Campus has 24/7 security.

climate.zh: 南半球气候，与北半球季节相反
climate.en: Southern hemisphere climate, opposite seasons to the north

visa.zh: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → 毕业后Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485，2-4年) → 可通过技术移民或雇主担保申请PR。澳洲对留学生移民政策相对友好。
visa.en: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485, 2-4 years post-study) → PR via skilled migration or employer sponsorship. Australia has relatively friendly immigration policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一不强制住校。校内宿舍（College）约A$12,000-20,000/年。校外合租更常见，约A$200-350/周。
housing.en: No mandatory on-campus housing. University colleges ~A$12,000-20,000/yr. Off-campus shared housing more common, ~A$200-350/week.

graduationRate.zh: 澳洲本科通常3年制（荣誉学位4年）。毕业率良好。
graduationRate.en: Australian undergrad is typically 3 years (Honours 4 years). Good graduation rates.

employment.zh: 毕业生可获2-4年工作签证。澳洲就业市场稳定，矿业、金融、科技行业需求旺盛。
employment.en: Graduates receive 2-4 year work visas. Stable job market with strong demand in mining, finance, and tech.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买OSHC（海外学生健康保险）约A$500-700/年。覆盖医院、门诊和部分药物费用。校内通常有Health Service。
healthcare.en: ✅ Mandatory OSHC (Overseas Student Health Cover) ~A$500-700/yr. Covers hospital, GP visits, and some medications. On-campus Health Service usually available.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 入学时间：2月（主）/ 7月（次）
💰 申请费：A$0-150（多数免费）
📝 所需材料：成绩单、IELTS/TOEFL、个人陈述
✅ 不要求SAT/ACT，IB可直接申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly to each university
📅 Intakes: Feb (main) / Jul (mid-year)
💰 Fee: A$0-150 (many free)
📝 Required: Transcripts, IELTS/TOEFL, personal statement
✅ No SAT/ACT needed, IB accepted directly

city.zh: 新南威尔士州 悉尼

majorTuition.en: University of Sydney international tuition varies: A$43,000-A$58,000/yr (~$27,741-$37,419).

desc.zh: 悉尼大学是澳洲历史最悠久的大学（1850年），校园建筑哥特式风格壮观。商学院和医学院全球领先。
desc.en: USyd is Australia's oldest university (1850) with stunning Gothic architecture. Business and medicine are globally leading.

city.zh: 新南威尔士州 悉尼

majorTuition.en: UNSW Sydney international tuition varies: A$42,000-A$56,000/yr (~$27,096-$36,129).

desc.zh: UNSW以工程和商科见长，与工业界联系紧密。位于悉尼东区，靠近硅谷式科技园区。澳洲最大的Co-op项目。
desc.en: UNSW excels in engineering and commerce with strong industry ties. Located in Sydney's east, near tech hubs. Australia's largest co-op program.

majorTuition.en: Australian National University international tuition varies: A$40,000-A$52,000/yr (~$25,806-$33,548).

desc.zh: ANU位于澳洲首都堪培拉，政治学和国际关系全球顶尖。与联邦政府机构联系紧密，实习资源丰富。
desc.en: ANU is in Australia's capital. Globally top-ranked in political science and international relations. Strong ties to federal government for internships.

city.zh: 昆士兰州 布里斯班

majorTuition.en: University of Queensland international tuition varies: A$38,000-A$54,000/yr (~$24,516-$34,838).

desc.zh: 昆士兰大学以生物科学和旅游管理闻名，拥有澳洲最大最美的校园之一。布里斯班气候宜人，生活成本较低。
desc.en: UQ is renowned for biological sciences and tourism management, with one of Australia's largest and most beautiful campuses. Brisbane has great weather and lower costs.

desc.zh: 西澳大学以采矿工程和海洋科学闻名。珀斯是澳洲最阳光的城市，与亚洲时区接近。学费在Go8中最低。
desc.en: UWA is known for mining engineering and marine science. Perth is Australia's sunniest city, close to Asian time zones. Lowest Go8 fees.

climate.zh: 南半球气候，与北半球季节相反
climate.en: Southern hemisphere climate, opposite seasons to the north

visa.zh: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → 毕业后Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485，2-4年) → 可通过技术移民或雇主担保申请PR。澳洲对留学生移民政策相对友好。
visa.en: Student Visa (Subclass 500) → Temporary Graduate Visa (Subclass 485, 2-4 years post-study) → PR via skilled migration or employer sponsorship. Australia has relatively friendly immigration policies for graduates.

housing.zh: 大一不强制住校。校内宿舍（College）约A$12,000-20,000/年。校外合租更常见，约A$200-350/周。
housing.en: No mandatory on-campus housing. University colleges ~A$12,000-20,000/yr. Off-campus shared housing more common, ~A$200-350/week.

graduationRate.zh: 澳洲本科通常3年制（荣誉学位4年）。毕业率良好。
graduationRate.en: Australian undergrad is typically 3 years (Honours 4 years). Good graduation rates.

employment.zh: 毕业生可获2-4年工作签证。澳洲就业市场稳定，矿业、金融、科技行业需求旺盛。
employment.en: Graduates receive 2-4 year work visas. Stable job market with strong demand in mining, finance, and tech.

healthcare.zh: ✅ 强制购买OSHC（海外学生健康保险）约A$500-700/年。覆盖医院、门诊和部分药物费用。校内通常有Health Service。
healthcare.en: ✅ Mandatory OSHC (Overseas Student Health Cover) ~A$500-700/yr. Covers hospital, GP visits, and some medications. On-campus Health Service usually available.

application.zh:
📋 申请平台：直接向学校申请（各校独立系统）
📅 入学时间：2月（主）/ 7月（次）
💰 申请费：A$0-150（多数免费）
📝 所需材料：成绩单、IELTS/TOEFL、个人陈述
✅ 不要求SAT/ACT，IB可直接申请
application.en:
📋 Platform: Apply directly to each university
📅 Intakes: Feb (main) / Jul (mid-year)
💰 Fee: A$0-150 (many free)
📝 Required: Transcripts, IELTS/TOEFL, personal statement
✅ No SAT/ACT needed, IB accepted directly

majorTuition.en: University of Adelaide international tuition varies: A$36,000-A$52,000/yr (~$23,225-$33,548).

desc.zh: 阿德莱德大学以酿酒学全球第一闻名，医学和工程也很强。阿德莱德生活成本是Go8城市中最低的，且有移民加分。
desc.en: Adelaide is #1 globally in oenology/winemaking, with strong medicine and engineering. Adelaide has the lowest living costs among Go8 cities, plus immigration bonus points.

requirements.IB:
各专业IB要求不同：
• Arts 文学：28
• Commerce 商学：30
• Science 理学：29
• Engineering 工程：31
• Medicine（本硕连读）：40
• Music 音乐：28
• Computer Science 计算机：30
• Winemaking 酿酒：29

deadline.zh: 主要入学季：2月（第一学期）/ 7月（第二学期）\n申请截止：入学前2-6个月
deadline.en: Main intakes: Feb (Sem 1) / Jul (Sem 2)\nDeadlines: 2-6 months before intake

safetyDetail.zh: 阿德莱德大学所在城市治安良好，澳大利亚整体安全指数高。校园设有24小时安保。
safetyDetail.en: University of Adelaide is in a safe city. Australia has high overall safety. Campus has 24/7 security.

climate.zh: 南半球气候，与北半球季节相反
climate.en: Southern hemisphere climate, opposite seasons to the north

desc.en: Macquarie is renowned for linguistics and commerce (CPA-accredited). Located in Sydney's north tech corridor, adjacent to many corporations.

desc.zh: RMIT以设计和建筑全球知名，位于墨尔本市中心。与工业界联系紧密，就业导向强。
desc.en: RMIT is globally renowned for design and architecture, located in central Melbourne. Strong industry connections and employment focus.

desc.en: QUT is known for practical education. Triple-crown accredited business school. Central Brisbane location with nationally leading creative industries.
